description: Clubhouse was a social audio application centered on live voice rooms and clubs. The `clubhouseapi.com` domain served the app's backend API, which has been publicly documented through reverse-engineered community specs and collections.
summary: clubhouseapi.com exposes one HTTP API at `https://www.clubhouseapi.com/api/`, documented by a public reverse-engineered OpenAPI spec and Postman collection, with authenticated calls using `CH-UserID` plus either `Authorization: Token <auth_token>` or `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` obtained through phone-number auth.
